title: The Phantom Time Hypothesis
author: Heribert Illig
content: The theory proposes that the Early Middle Ages (AD 614–911) never occurred and were invented by calendar tampering.
action: Historical records were easy to fake when few people controlled them.

title: The Great Moon Hoax
author: Various proponents
content: The theory argues that the 1969 Apollo moon landing was staged to secure geopolitical dominance during the Cold War.
action: Winning the public narrative can matter more than actual success.

title: Operation Northwoods
author: Joint Chiefs of Staff (declassified)
content: A proposed false flag operation in 1962 that involved CIA plans to commit acts of terrorism on US soil to justify war.
action: Governments have created plans to stage crises for public control.

title: The Dead Internet Theory
author: Online discourse
content: The theory posits that most internet traffic and content are generated by bots, creating a synthetic reality for human users.
action: Bots are cheaper and faster at driving engagement than humans.

title: The Tunguska Event
author: Various researchers
content: Speculation persists that the 1908 explosion was caused by an experimental energy transfer rather than a meteor.
action: No crater was found, making an experimental blast plausible.
